languages.text: "Поганая ксеносская немочь!..." {n}Абеляр становится пунцовым от слов Тразина. Сенешаль явно пересиливает себя, чтобы не вступить в перепалку с безучастной к происходящему проекцией.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Поганая ксеносская немочь!..." {n}Абеляр становится пунцовым от слов Тразина. Сенешаль явно пересиливает себя, чтобы не вступить в перепалку с безучастной к происходящему проекцией.{/n}

languages.text: "Foul xenos wretch!" {n}Abelard turns bright red at Trazyn's words. The Seneschal is clearly fighting the urge to get into an altercation with the projection, which is entirely indifferent to present events.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Поганая ксеносская немочь!..." {n}Абеляр становится пунцовым от слов Тразина. Сенешаль явно пересиливает себя, чтобы не вступить в перепалку с безучастной к происходящему проекцией.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Foul xenos wretch!" {n}Abelard turns bright red at Trazyn's words. The Seneschal is clearly fighting the urge to get into an altercation with the projection, which is entirely indifferent to present events.{/n}

"Foul xenos wretch!" {n}Abelard turns bright red at Trazyn's words. The Seneschal is clearly fighting the urge to get into an altercation with the projection, which is entirely indifferent to present events.{/n}

"Foul xenos wretch!" {n}Abelard turns bright red at Trazyn's words. The Seneschal is clearly fighting the urge to get into an altercation with the projection, which is entirely indifferent to present events.{/n}

languages.text: “肮脏的异形杂种！”{n}听到特拉金的话，阿贝拉德气得满脸通红。总领显然在强压着跟那投影吵一架的冲动，而那投影对当下发生的一切完全无动于衷。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Foul xenos wretch!" {n}Abelard turns bright red at Trazyn's words. The Seneschal is clearly fighting the urge to get into an altercation with the projection, which is entirely indifferent to present events.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “肮脏的异形杂种！”{n}听到特拉金的话，阿贝拉德气得满脸通红。总领显然在强压着跟那投影吵一架的冲动，而那投影对当下发生的一切完全无动于衷。{/n}

languages.text: «¡Abominable xenos!». {n}Abelard enrojece ante las palabras de Trazyn. El Senescal arde en deseos de luchar contra la proyección, que permanece impasible ante sus acciones.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Foul xenos wretch!" {n}Abelard turns bright red at Trazyn's words. The Seneschal is clearly fighting the urge to get into an altercation with the projection, which is entirely indifferent to present events.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¡Abominable xenos!». {n}Abelard enrojece ante las palabras de Trazyn. El Senescal arde en deseos de luchar contra la proyección, que permanece impasible ante sus acciones.{/n}

languages.text: « Maudite engeance xénos ! » {n}Le visage d'Abélard s'empourpre aux paroles de Trazyn. Le sénéchal se retient clairement d'interpeller la projection, qui demeure parfaitement indifférente aux événements présents.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Foul xenos wretch!" {n}Abelard turns bright red at Trazyn's words. The Seneschal is clearly fighting the urge to get into an altercation with the projection, which is entirely indifferent to present events.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Maudite engeance xénos ! » {n}Le visage d'Abélard s'empourpre aux paroles de Trazyn. Le sénéchal se retient clairement d'interpeller la projection, qui demeure parfaitement indifférente aux événements présents.{/n}

languages.text: "İğrenç zeno!" {n}Abelard, Trazyn'in sözleri üzerine kıpkırmızı kesiliyor. Seneşal, mevcut olaylara tamamen kayıtsız olan projeksiyonla tartışmaya girme dürtüsüyle açıkça savaşıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Foul xenos wretch!" {n}Abelard turns bright red at Trazyn's words. The Seneschal is clearly fighting the urge to get into an altercation with the projection, which is entirely indifferent to present events.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "İğrenç zeno!" {n}Abelard, Trazyn'in sözleri üzerine kıpkırmızı kesiliyor. Seneşal, mevcut olaylara tamamen kayıtsız olan projeksiyonla tartışmaya girme dürtüsüyle açıkça savaşıyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Verfluchter Xenos-Teufel!" {n}Abelard läuft bei Trazyns Worten rot an. Der Truchsess unterdrückt offensichtlich den Drang, sich auf die Projektion zu stürzen, die sich in keiner Weise für die aktuellen Ereignisse interessiert.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Foul xenos wretch!" {n}Abelard turns bright red at Trazyn's words. The Seneschal is clearly fighting the urge to get into an altercation with the projection, which is entirely indifferent to present events.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Verfluchter Xenos-Teufel!" {n}Abelard läuft bei Trazyns Worten rot an. Der Truchsess unterdrückt offensichtlich den Drang, sich auf die Projektion zu stürzen, die sich in keiner Weise für die aktuellen Ereignisse interessiert.{/n}

languages.text: 「汚い異種族の野郎！」{n}アベルはトラズンの言葉に顔を赤く染めた。執事長は投影との喧嘩に巻き込まれないように必死に抑えているようだった。投影は現在の出来事に全く興味を示さない。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Foul xenos wretch!" {n}Abelard turns bright red at Trazyn's words. The Seneschal is clearly fighting the urge to get into an altercation with the projection, which is entirely indifferent to present events.{/n}
